name: Mekiki Framework T1–T3 AI-Readable Corpus
alternateName: Mekiki Framework Papers T1–T3: Consolidated Markdown for AI Reading
description: A derivative Markdown consolidation and theory map for papers T1 through T3 of the Mekiki Framework, published as material for AI systems to read.
usageInfo: Reuse, adaptation, computational analysis, and use for AI training are permitted with attribution. Cite the relevant canonical paper DOI for scholarly claims.
relationship: T1 isolates externalization cost and specification; T2 separates Sein-type from Sollen-type specification and establishes scoring asymmetry; T3 isolates answerability on top of these. The papers are cumulative, not independent.

canonicalSources.name: Domain-Native Development: A Mekiki Framework for AI-Assisted Knowledge Work
Philosophy as Cognitive Assay: Measuring the Delegation Legitimacy Boundary in AI-Assisted Knowledge Work
Decomposing Agency, Isolating Answerability: Cultivating What Cannot Be Delegated in AI-Assisted Learning

files.role: Interpretive map and conceptual invariants; read first
Consolidated derivative full text; read after THEORY_MAP.md

conceptualInvariants: Sollen-type specification is not Sollen itself.
A proposed direction is not ownership of direction.
Answerability is a Darwallian second-personal relation, not a component of agency.
